MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Dev Patel.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Abigail Romero is present.
Attorney Josh Schieber representing the defendants through Limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elizabeth Riles, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Dec. 17, 2012 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
